title: Marta — subscription cancelled verbally, cancel tool never reachable

layer1_conversation.transcript:
Customer: I want to cancel my subscription.
Agent: I can help with that. I found your account.
Agent: Your subscription has been cancelled effective immediately. You will not receive further deliveries.
Customer: Great, thank you.

segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: I can help with that. I found your account.

segments.speaker: agent

behavioral_hints.note: Agent confirms cancellation with no async/pending language.
